metadata.title: Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh Document Index
metadata.source_policy: Supplemental source index only; Zekelman 2025 remains canonical.
metadata.trusted_teacher_source_policy: Loshon Hakodesh / Loshon HaTorah resources are trusted teacher sources, but OCR and extraction accuracy still require Yossi confirmation before downstream use.
metadata.runtime_policy: No indexed source is runtime-ready or question-ready.
metadata.rerun_note: Raw PDF source discovery was rerun after the main book and answer booklet were added to the repo.

documents.title: Loshon Hakodesh Book OCR / Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering the Basics
documents.confirmation_needed_reason: OCR/page layout and Hebrew extraction require Yossi extraction-accuracy confirmation.
documents.extraction_method: pypdf page-delimited text extraction from embedded OCR/text layer
documents.notes: Supplemental enrichment evidence only; it must not override Zekelman 2025 wording, numbering, scope, or level progression.

documents.title: Answer Booklet to Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering the Basics
documents.confirmation_needed_reason: Answer booklet is trusted source material, but extraction accuracy and non-runtime answer-key boundaries require confirmation.
documents.extraction_method: pypdf page-delimited text extraction from embedded OCR/text layer
documents.notes: Supplemental source-review evidence only. The answer booklet is not runtime-ready, not question-ready, and not an active answer key.

documents.title: Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh foundation rules, source-modeled JSONL
